Formatting guide:
## Heading — section heading
**bold text** — bold
_italic text_ — italics
• item or - item — bullet point
--- — dividing line

📝 Sentence Starters

Sentence Starters

Select your text from the dropdown, fill in the blanks, and tap Save to store your best sentences in My Sentences.

ACT
Introduction Starters
Address the Question · Context · Thesis
AAddress the Question
In , presents as and .
Overall, portrays as yet also .
In , offers a presentation of , which appears and .
CContext
Written in , reflects about .
As a audience faced , uses to challenge .
Set in , mirrors contemporary anxieties about .
TThesis
Through exploration of , and , it becomes clear that presents as in order to .
By exploring alongside and , reveals that which matters because .
Across the text, consideration of , and suggests that intends to convey so that the audience recognises .
PARAGRAPH
Paragraph Starters
What · Where · How · Why
WHATTopic Sentence — What point are you making?
One significant way presents is through because .
Another key way develops is by portraying as , which suggests .
A further important aspect of is the way uses to reveal .
WHEREQuotation + Immediate Analysis — Where is your evidence?
This is illustrated when states "", which emphasises .
The idea is reinforced when uses the phrase "" to highlight .
This becomes particularly evident when declares "" because this underscores .
HOWDetailed Language / Method Analysis — How does the writer craft meaning?
The use of intensifies .
This choice deepens the impression of as it accentuates .
Through this , the writer strengthens the sense of .
The deliberate focus on amplifies .
The writer's use of heightens by drawing attention to .
WHYEffect on the Audience — Why does this matter?
This encourages the audience to consider and reflect on .
As a result, the reader is prompted to recognise .
Ultimately, this leads the audience to question .

Tap any card to copy the starter to your clipboard. Replace the text in [brackets] with your own ideas.
